raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Governor's proposed budget for 2022-2023 includes $6.1 billion for investments in zero emission vehicles.",
    "$1.1 billion is set aside for zero emission trucks, buses, off-road equipment, and fueling infrastructure.",
    "There is an emerging consensus that hydrogen is well-suited to power the medium and heavy-duty transportation sector.",
    "The omission of funding to accelerate the development of light and medium duty hydrogen infrastructure will negatively impact California's zero emission vehicle goals.",
    "Access to an electric vehicle-charging outlet may not be feasible for every resident in densely populated communities.",
    "Hydrogen fuel cell vehicles could allow residents a zero emission vehicular option that can be parked anywhere.",
    "California must commit resources to attract private sector investment in hydrogen infrastructure."
  ]
}
```
